# Invoiso

> Invoiso is a free, open-source, offline invoice and billing desktop application for Windows, Linux, and macOS. No subscription, no cloud, no account required. Popular free alternative to Vyapar, Zoho Invoice, and Wave for Indian small businesses.

## About

Invoiso is built for freelancers, small businesses, shop owners, and consultants who need professional invoicing without internet dependency or recurring costs. All data is stored locally on the user's device using a SQLite database — nothing is sent to any server.

## Key Features

- 100% offline — no internet required at any point
- Professional PDF invoices with one click (Classic, Modern, Minimal templates)
- Customer and product management with search, sort, and filter
- Payment tracking — record partial or full payments, track outstanding balances
- PDF payment receipts for every recorded payment
- GST-ready invoices with GSTIN, HSN codes, and configurable tax rates (India)
- UPI payment QR code embedded in PDF invoices (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm)
- Multi-currency support: INR, USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, AED, SGD, AUD, CAD
- Invoice and quotation document types
- Duplicate / clone any invoice with one click
- Role-based access control (admin and standard user roles)
- Bulk CSV import/export for customers
- Data backup and restore
- No subscription, no fees — free forever
- Open source under the MIT licence

## Use Cases

Invoiso is well suited for:
- Indian small businesses needing free GST billing software
- Kirana shops, retailers, traders, and wholesalers who need offline billing
- Freelancers and consultants who need PDF invoices without a subscription
- Service businesses and repair shops needing UPI QR payment on invoices
- Users looking for a free Vyapar alternative or free Tally alternative
- Businesses that want local-first billing with no cloud dependency

## Pages

- [Home](https://invoiso.co.in/) — Overview, features, comparison vs Vyapar/Zoho/Wave, screenshots, and demo
- [Download](https://invoiso.co.in/download.html) — Latest release for Windows, Linux, and macOS
- [Free Online Invoice Maker](https://invoiso.co.in/invoice-maker.html) — Browser-based PDF invoice generator, no signup
- [FAQ](https://invoiso.co.in/faq.html) — Answers to common questions
- [Release Notes](https://invoiso.co.in/changelog.html) — Full version history
- [Free GST Billing Software](https://invoiso.co.in/free-gst-billing-software.html) — GST-ready invoice workflow for Indian small businesses
- [Offline Billing Software](https://invoiso.co.in/offline-billing-software.html) — Desktop billing with local data and no cloud dependency
- [Free Vyapar Alternative](https://invoiso.co.in/vyapar-alternative.html) — Comparison-focused page for businesses evaluating alternatives
- [Open Source Invoice Software](https://invoiso.co.in/open-source-invoice-software.html) — Source-code and transparency focused overview
- [Invoice Software for Linux](https://invoiso.co.in/invoice-software-for-linux.html) — Linux AppImage and DEB invoice app overview
- [Blog](https://invoiso.co.in/blog/) — Practical guides for GST invoices, UPI QR payments, offline billing, and Linux invoicing
